title_header: GOD OF THE HIGH SCHOOL Chapter 1: The Match With Gods (Episode 1)

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sir, Prosecutor GANG IS ON THE PHONE. PUT HIM THROUGH.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Okay, ASSEMBLYMAN PARK, Show DOA.

dialogue.speaker: Prosecutor GANG
dialogue.line: YOU MUST BE REALLY BUSY LATELY. WHAT DO YOU WANT? WELL, ACCORDING TO A RUMOR, YOU'RE WORKING ON A BILL THAT MAY BE DANGEROUS?

dialogue.speaker: Prosecutor GANG
dialogue.line: IF YOU DO THIS, IT'LL PUT US PROSECUTORS IN A TOUGH SPOT. HOW MUCH DO YOU WANT?

dialogue.speaker: ASSEMBLYMAN PARK
dialogue.line: I'M SORRY, BUT YOU'VE CROSSED THE LINE THIS TIME. I'LL SEE YOU AT THE PUBLIC PROSECUTION'S OFFICE PRETTY SOON. AND I'M ENJOYING USING THE MONEY YOU'VE SENT ME BY THE WAY. WELL, THEN.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW! AS EXPECTED OF PROSECUTOR GANG! YOU GOT THAT SCARY MR. PARK COMPLETELY UNDER YOUR CONTROL!

dialogue.speaker: Prosecutor GANG
dialogue.line: SHUT UP! THAT BASTARD IS CRAZY!

dialogue.speaker: Prosecutor GANG
dialogue.line: WHO IN THEIR RIGHT MIND WOULD TRY TO PASS A BILL LIKE THIS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT KIND OF BILL IS IT?

dialogue.speaker: Prosecutor GANG
dialogue.line: CAUGHT HIM RIGHT IN THE ACT. SOMETHING SEEMED FISHY WHEN HE RAISED HIS BRIBES LATELY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, Mr. Park! COME HERE! COME ON! COME HERE!

dialogue.speaker: ASSEMBLYMAN PARK
dialogue.line: WHAT? WHAT'S THAT?

dialogue.speaker: ASSEMBLYMAN PARK
dialogue.line: HMM? GEH?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HOW'S THE PROGRESS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THEY'LL BE RECEIVING THEIR INVITATIONS TODAY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: GOOD.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HURRY! WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yes, Sir!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH, JESUS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WAS IT A NEW WEAPON?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WELL, WE'RE STILL NOT SURE YET. MY GOODNESS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT THE HECK HAPPENED?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT IN THE WORLD?! HE WON?! NO WAY! WOW!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: I'M THE BEST FIGHTER!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: OH, OKAY. LALALALA~ LALALA~

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: MY NAME IS MORI JIN. 17 YEARS OLD. MY FIGHTING RECORD: 299 BOUTS, 297 WINS, 2 TIES AND 0 LOSSES. IN OTHER WORDS, I'VE NEVER LOST A FIGHT BEFORE. WHY AM I SO GOOD AT FIGHTING? THAT'S SIMPLE. IT'S BECAUSE I LEARNED TAEKWONDO FROM MY GRANDFATHER, THE ONE AND ONLY FAMILY I HAVE.

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: GOOD. THANKS TO THAT, I CAN CLEARLY SEE SOMEONE'S PUNCHES NO MATTER HOW FAST WHENEVER I FIGHT. I JUST KEEP MY EYES OPEN AND AVOID ALL THEIR PUNCHES. THAT'S WHY I'VE NEVER BEEN HIT BEFORE.

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: WHAT'S MORE, NO MATTER HOW BIG THEY ARE, I CAN KNOCK THEM DOWN WITH A SINGLE PUNCH! AS EXPECTED OF TAEKWONDO, OUR NATIONAL SPORT!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: IT'S EVEN BEEN RECOGNIZED AS AN OFFICIAL SPORT IN THE OLYMPICS! THE BEST! THE BEST FIGHTER! I'M THE BEST FIGHTER! THE BEST! THE BEST FIGHTER!

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: MR. MORI JIN?

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: CONGRATULATIONS! YOU'RE NOW QUALIFIED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE "GOD OF HIGH SCHOOL COMPETITION"!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: THE BEST! THE BEST FIGHTER! I'M THE BEST!

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: SORRY, I HAVEN'T INTRODUCED MYSELF YET. I'M R, A COMMISSIONER FOR THE G.O.H.

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: LIKE I SAID, YOU'RE... YOU LEARNED TAEKWONDO TOO, DIDN'T YOU?! I SAW THE WAY YOU JUST MOVED!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: PARDON?

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: COME ON, DON'T PRETEND YOU DON'T KNOW.

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: DESPITE HOW I LOOK, I'M ACTUALLY A BLACK BELT IN TAEKWONDO. HUK! IT'S INTERESTING THAT TAEKWONDO HAS THAT KIND OF SKILL. ANYWAY, YOU'RE QUALIFIED TO JOIN THE G.O.H.

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: IF YOU WIN, WE'LL GRANT YOUR WISH!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: SORRY?

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: IF YOU WIN THE CHAMPIONSHIP, WE'LL GIVE YOU ANYTHING YOU DESIRE: MONEY, HONOR, ANYTHING YOU MAY WANT.

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: I SEE. OKAY!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: THE BEST! THE BEST FIGHTER! I'M THE BEST FIGHTER!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: THE BEST! THE BEST FIGHTER! I'M...

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: THE COMPETITION RULES ARE SIMPLE. IT DOESN'T MATTER WHAT KIND OF MARTIAL ARTS YOU USE, AND THERE ARE NO LIMITS WITH WEAPONS AS WELL. WE WILL ALSO TAKE COMPLETE RESPONSIBILITY FOR YOUR SAFETY.

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: I WILL TELL YOU AGAIN, MR. MORI JIN, YOU'RE QUALIFIED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE G.O.H.

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: HOW DID YOU DO THAT?

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: WHEN YOU PARTICIPATE IN THE G.O.H., YOU'LL LEARN. BUT MORE THAN THAT, IF YOU WIN...

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: I DON'T NEED ANY OF THAT. LET'S FIGHT RIGHT NOW! IF YOU BEAT ME, THEN I'LL PARTICIPATE IN THE GOD OF WHATS-ITS-NAME.

dialogue.speaker: R
dialogue.line: MUST WE DO THIS?

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: COME ON!

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: I LOST.

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: THE GOD OF HIGH SCHOOL... MAYBE IT'S TIME TO GET SERIOUS?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NAME: MORI JIN. AGE: 17. FIGHTING RECORD: 300 BOUTS, 297 WINS, 2 TIES AND 1 LOSS.

dialogue.speaker: Mori Jin
dialogue.line: GRANDPA! I FINALLY MET SOMEONE WHO'S STRONG! YOU SCOUNDREL, TELL ME IN PERSON!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AND THESE INVITATIONS WERE DELIVERED TO JEOLLA PROVINCE, GYEONGSANG PROVINCE, GANGWON PROVINCE, AND BEYOND THAT; TO CHINA, SPAIN, THE U.S.A., FRANCE, AND BEYOND. GREENLAND, CANADA, RUSSIA, USA, CHINA, INDIA, BRAZIL, AUSTRALIA. THEY WERE DELIVERED ALL OVER THE WORLD.

summary: The episode opens with a tense political confrontation involving Prosecutor Gang and Assemblyman Park, hinting at a dangerous bill and corruption. Later, the focus shifts to Mori Jin, a 17-year-old Taekwondo prodigy with an undefeated record, who is invited to the "God of High School" competition by Commissioner R, promising to grant any wish to the winner. Mori challenges R to a fight, loses, and then decides to take the competition seriously, as invitations are sent worldwide.
